name: ER — Opća bolnica Zadar
description: General Hospital Zadar — 24h emergency department (OHBP). Nearest real ER for the Jun 16 Zadar start and the Velebit/Paklenica area.
communityNotes: Full ER, all specialties except peds/psych. Bože Peričića 5, central Zadar. Emergency: 194 or 112.

name: ER — Opća bolnica Šibenik
description: General Hospital Šibenik — nearest hospital for the Krka NP / Skradin area on the Jun 17 leg.

name: ER — KBC Split (Firule)
description: Clinical Hospital Centre Split, Firule campus — the real ER for the Split / Omiš / Makarska Riviera zone (Riviera towns have clinics only). ~45 min from Makarska.
communityNotes: Spinčićeva, Firule, Split — 24h. Makarska/Omiš have summer tourist clinics only (Makarska +385 21 612 033). Emergency: 194 or 112.

name: ER — Opća bolnica Dubrovnik
description: General Hospital Dubrovnik (Lapad) — 24/7 ER, the regional hospital for the Jun 18–19 Dubrovnik base and the airport pickup.
communityNotes: Two 24h pharmacies alternate weekly (Old Town 'kod Zvonika' / Gruž). Emergency: 194 or 112.

name: ER — JZU Bolnica Trebinje
description: Hospital Trebinje — secondary hospital ~30 min from Dubrovnik, relevant if sleeping Trebinje/Konavle side on the no-repeat loop.
communityNotes: Dr Levija 2, Trebinje (Republika Srpska). Emergency: 124 or 112.

name: ER — SKB Mostar
description: University Clinical Hospital Mostar (Bijeli Brijeg) — region's largest, 24h ER. The real hospital for the Mostar/Kravica days AND for the Konjic/Boračko zone (~35 min; Konjic has a clinic only).

name: ER — KCUS Klinički centar Sarajevo
description: Klinički centar Universiteta Sarajevo — Bosnia's main tertiary hospital, 24h ER. The real hospital for the Jun 22 Sarajevo overnight.
communityNotes: Bolnička 25, Sarajevo. +387 33 297 000. 24h pharmacies across the city. Emergency: 124 or 112.

name: Clinic — Žabljak health station
description: Žabljak primary-care / small emergency unit — VERY limited (2 doctors). For anything serious from Durmitor/Sutjeska, evacuate to Nikšić or Podgorica. Jakova Ostojića bb.
communityNotes: +382 67 613 158. Nearest real hospital = Opšta bolnica Nikšić (~45 km / 1h25). Carry your own first-aid kit for Durmitor. Emergency: 124 or 112.

name: ER — Opšta bolnica Nikšić
description: General Hospital Nikšić — the nearest real hospital with surgery/ER for the Durmitor / Žabljak / Piva area (~1h25 from Žabljak). Plan evac time accordingly on rafting/hike days.

name: ER — Klinički centar Crne Gore (KCCG)
description: Clinical Centre of Montenegro, Podgorica — the country's main tertiary hospital. The serious-case hospital for the Skadar/Virpazar/Budva zone and for Durmitor evacuations.
communityNotes: Ljubljanska bb, Podgorica. +382 20 412 412. 24h pharmacies in Podgorica. Emergency: 124 or 112.

name: ER — Opšta bolnica Kotor
description: General Hospital Kotor — regional hospital for Kotor/Budva/coast. Has a signed foreigner/tourist entrance (English & Russian) and multilingual nurses.
communityNotes: Škaljari, Kotor. +382 32 325 602. For Budva, this or Podgorica are the serious-case options. Emergency: 124 or 112.
